CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK( mfg_Cycle_Time_In_Minutes__c ), mfg_Cycle_Time_In_Minutes__c <= 0, ISBLANK(VALUE( $Label.mfg_Production_Hours_Per_Day )) ), 0, FLOOR( (VALUE($Label.mfg_Production_Hours_Per_Day) * 60) / mfg_Cycle_Time_In_Minutes__c ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows how many full production batches can be completed in a day based on available working hours and cycle time. Partial batches are ignored and the value is shown as zero if required inputs are missing or invalid.
CustomField.label: Batches Per Day
